title: Villages ReImagined
description: Adds a procedural city structure to the plains and meadows biomes.
body:
🌆 Villages Reimagined 🌆

Say goodbye to boring empty fields — Villages Reimagined brings new life to your Minecraft world by adding modern, fully built cities alongside the classic villages! These new towns spawn naturally across plains and meadow biomes, complete with detailed buildings, connected roads, and a realistic community layout.

🔥 Key Features:

🏠 6 Unique Houses:
Each city features six distinct house designs, from small cozy homes to stylish larger builds — every one crafted to feel alive and unique.

🛒 The Store:
Every city includes a store where you can trade, explore, or use it as a perfect base for your adventures.

🎓 The School:
A complete school structure adds depth and personality — great for builders, storytellers, and roleplayers who want a true town experience.

🛣️ Connected Roads:
All buildings are connected by detailed roads, bringing structure and flow to your world. It’s the perfect foundation for expanding your own custom city or creating an urban survival base.

🌾 Natural Generation:
Cities spawn alongside normal villages — in plains and meadow biomes — so you’ll still find the old ones, just with some impressive new neighbors nearby.

✨ Why Play This Mod?
Because Minecraft’s world feels way more alive when you stumble upon full cities instead of just tiny villages. Villages Reimagined gives builders, explorers, and adventurers a new reason to travel and settle.

📖 Compatibility and Installation:
Built for seamless integration with other mods and world generation systems. Just drop it in, explore, and discover the next evolution of civilization in Minecraft.

🏙️ The world just got busier — welcome to Villages Reimagined.
